subtitles.original: Are you guys enjoying the show so far?
subtitles.english: Are you guys enjoying the show so far?

subtitles.original: Ah, you know, um, I was really...

subtitles.english: so I couldn't have thought of a better song to open than Tako Tako.

subtitles.english: So I hope you guys had fun singing it! Thank you again!

subtitles.english: I always feel like my journey here wouldn't have
